name: Spinach & Cheese Squares
recipeIngredient: 275 grams frozen chopped spinach (thawed and drained well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
2. Add the wholemeal flour, thawed and drained spinach, cottage cheese, reduced-fat cheddar cheese, and ground black pepper to the bowl with the beaten eggs. Mix until well combined.
3. Spoon the mixture into a well-greased large oven-proof dish.
4. Bake in an oven preheated to 187°C (350°F, gas mark 4) for about 45 minutes.
5. Allow to cool for at least 5 minutes before serving.
